channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Vapes aren’t just for smoking anymore—now they’re digital toys
item.description: Vaping devices are getting a makeover—one that seems likely to turn more teens into consumers. Experts have long worried that nicotine vapes appeal to minors with flavors like Cotton Candy and Blue Razz, along with bright candy-colored designs. Today’s vapes double as digital gadgets.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Underground trading of malicious LLMs is fueling cybercrime
item.description: The web is being swamped by AI slop—but the swamp is creeping closer to home. Your email inboxes, phone SMS apps, instant messaging, and social media services are all being overtaken by inauthentic content.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: The strategic move CIOs must take to transform procurement
item.description: Many procurement teams are struggling to optimize spend while effectively managing supplier relationships, mitigating supply chain disruptions, and maintaining compliance. Traditional procurement processes – often manual and siloed – can’t keep up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Humans as hardware - no, not the name of a new Matrix movie prequel but a shocking idea about human tissue
item.description: Welcome to the Matrix: Japanese researcher wants to use human soft tissue to process data like a computer.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Understand Python’s new lock file format
item.description: Python Enhancement Proposal (PEP) 751 gives Python a new file format for specifying dependencies. This file, called a lock file, promises to allow developers to reproduce the installation of their Python projects, with the exact same sets of dependencies, from system to system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Annoyed by YouTube autoplaying videos on Android? Sorry, it’s not a bug, it’s another experimental feature
item.description: YouTube is yet again exploring with new features, as Android users have noticed this strange auto-play function in their mobile apps.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams and Zoe Saldaña earn Webby Award nominations, along with Nutter Butter
item.description: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams, Zoe Saldaña and Nutter Butter are among the nominees for this year’s Webby Awards, recognizing the best internet content and creators.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Save loved ones' voicemails with Android
item.description: Preserving voicemails securely on Android: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals easy methods to keep memories alive forever.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk says he sent MAGA influencer Ashley St. Clair $2.5 million, open to paternity test
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk and conservative influencer Ashley St. Clair publicly feuded on the social platform X on Monday after she accused the world’s richest person of withdrawing child care support and refusing to take a paternity test.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: New Python lock file format will specify dependencies
item.description: Python’s builders have accepted a proposal to create a universal lock file format for Python projects that would specify dependencies, enabling installation reproducibility in a Python environment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: After fake employees, fake enterprises are next hiring threat to corporate data
item.description: Chinese companies are trying to cut Taiwan’s lead in semiconductor technology by hiring away its best engineering talent through ‘front’ companies that hide their connections to China, the Taiwanese Ministry of Justice Investigation Bureau (MJIB) has alleged.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints
item.description: A new Navy initiative seeks best-of-breed solutions for more centralized endpoint management, the service technology experts share. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Navy’s Justin Fanelli, Brandon Wehler and Matthew Rambo on unified endpoints first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 14 alternative managed Kubernetes platforms
item.description: Kubernetes is mighty powerful but highly complex. This has influenced many organizations to ditch self-hosted solutions and move toward more fully managed Kubernetes platforms. Nearly 90% of Kubernetes users use cloud-managed services, DataDog reported in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: GenAI, the future of fraud and why you may be an easy target
item.description: With the help of artificial intelligence, sophisticated fraud techniques emerging today are virtually undetectable to the untrained eye.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Splunk’s Paul Kurtz on top 4 DoD cyber challenges, strategies to solve them
item.description: As mobile device use grows, DoD tech must adapt to the environment soldiers are in to provide secure, accessible data, Splunk chief cybersecurity advisor says.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Kyndryl extends Google Cloud partnership for AI-based mainframe modernization
item.description: Kyndryl and Google Cloud are expanding their partnership to help customers use generative AI to move data off the mainframe and into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, NewsNation
